content:
DEPLOY RED ITEMS TO PRODUCTION NOW — PROJECT ENGAGEMENT

Repository:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

MISSION:
Fix every red item shown as "Not on production" and deploy live with evidence.

RED ITEMS TO COMPLETE:

1. Video project cards
2. Like buttons
3. Comment sections
4. Share buttons
5. Save buttons
6. Instagram-style engagement

DO NOT add new features.
Deploy what is already built.

PHASE 1 — CONFIRM CODE EXISTS

Verify files:
- InstagramProjectCard.tsx
- ProjectEngagementBar.tsx
- ProjectCommentsSheet.tsx
- ProjectShareSheet.tsx
- AdminMediaUpload.tsx
- project-engagement.ts
- project-engagement.sql
- landing.tsx
- hono.ts

Return:
FILES_FOUND:
FILES_MISSING:

PHASE 2 — DATABASE

Run migration for:
- project_media
- project_videos
- project_likes
- project_comments
- project_shares
- project_saves
- project_analytics

Return:
MIGRATION_STATUS:
TABLES_CREATED:
TABLES_VERIFIED:

PHASE 3 — API VERIFY

Test production endpoints:
- GET /api/projects/:id/media
- POST /api/projects/:id/media
- POST /api/projects/:id/like
- GET /api/projects/:id/comments
- POST /api/projects/:id/comments
- POST /api/projects/:id/share
- POST /api/projects/:id/save
- GET /api/projects/:id/engagement

Return:
ENDPOINT:
HTTP_STATUS:
RESPONSE_BODY:
PASS_FAIL:

PHASE 4 — LANDING PAGE

Update ivxholding.com project cards to show:
- video preview
- like button
- comment button
- share button
- save button
- engagement counts

Return:
VIDEO_PROJECT_CARDS:
LIKE_BUTTONS:
COMMENTS:
SHARE:
SAVE:
ENGAGEMENT:

PHASE 5 — APP SYNC

Update app project cards with same features:
- video preview
- likes
- comments
- share
- save
- analytics

Return:
APP_VIDEO_STATUS:
APP_LIKE_STATUS:
APP_COMMENT_STATUS:
APP_SHARE_STATUS:
APP_SAVE_STATUS:

PHASE 6 — DEPLOY

Commit, push, deploy.

Return:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_STATUS:
HEALTH_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:

PHASE 7 — LIVE EVIDENCE

Verify live production:
- ivxholding.com loads
- project video visible
- like works
- comments open
- share works
- save works
- analytics records action

FINAL OUTPUT ONLY:

VIDEO_PROJECT_CARDS:
LIKE_BUTTONS:
COMMENT_SECTIONS:
SHARE_BUTTONS:
SAVE_BUTTONS:
INSTAGRAM_STYLE_ENGAGEMENT:
LANDING_STATUS:
APP_STATUS:
DATABASE_STATUS:
API_STATUS:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
HEALTH_STATUS:
COMMIT_MATCH:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

COMPLETE only if all red items are green in production.
No placeholders.
No LOCAL ONLY.
No fake COMPLETE.
